name: LEADING_COUNTRY_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, rank countries/regions by patent counts based on assignee origin.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)-[:ORIGIN_FROM]->(o:Origin)
RETURN o.name AS origin, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, min(p.pub_no) AS example_patent
ORDER BY patent_count DESC
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which country is leading in PD-1×VEGFA patents?
